Author: KKT
Name: SoundMixer
Punchline: Advanced FFXIV Sound Effect Volume Mixer
Description: 【国际 Global 构建】Per-SCD-path volume control: groups, Glob, presets, live monitor, blacklist, BGM/ambient, IPC overrides, resizable UI. 0–350% gain; optional Safe Mode. Commands: /soundmixer, /smix
Changelog: 0.2.2.0: Safe Mode (optional mount hook guard, off by default); blacklist official fetch; bilingual official notes. See in-app changelog.
FeedbackMessage: Please include steps to reproduce and the sound path if reporting a matching issue.
